Portfolio.selectedWorkDescription: Three projects under real development, with no placeholder demos.
Portfolio.practiceNotesDescription: Decision evidence, failure paths, and verification methods.

Evidence.title: Evidence Graph
Evidence.description: Connect research claims back to source evidence readers can inspect.
Evidence.sample: The sample workspace uses deterministic research data and makes no real provider calls.

Auth.title: Sign in to Evidence Graph
Auth.description: Continue to the research workspace with GitHub.
Auth.error: Sign-in did not complete. Try again.

dashboard.title: Research projects
dashboard.description: Review project status and recent updates, or start a traceable research project.

empty.title: No research projects yet
empty.description: Your first research project will appear here after it is created.

Projects.deleteConfirm: Delete “{title}”? This action cannot be undone.

form.title: Define the research question
form.description: Save the research scope, core question, and sources to review.

errors.title: Enter a project title between 1 and 120 characters.
errors.question: Enter a research question between 1 and 2,000 characters.
errors.manualUrls: Source links must be valid URLs, with no more than 5 entries.
errors.invalid: Check the errors in the form.
errors.monthlyLimit: The monthly limit of 3 research runs has been reached.

Workspace.emptyClaims: No claims match the current filters.
Workspace.noSource: Select a claim to inspect its source

graph.ariaLabel: Evidence graph. Use arrow keys to browse nodes and Enter to select
graph.keyboardHint: Use arrow keys to move between graph nodes and Enter to select. Drag or zoom the canvas with a pointer.

Workspace.loadingDescription: Preparing claims, evidence relations, and saved source text.
Workspace.emptyTitle: No claims are ready for review
Workspace.emptyDescription: Claims and linked evidence will appear here after extraction completes.
Workspace.errorDescription: No data was changed. You can reload the current research project.
Workspace.notFoundDescription: The project may have been deleted or this link is no longer valid.

managed.queuedDescription: The research run is waiting to start. Results will appear automatically when ready.
managed.runningDescription: Sources, claims, and evidence relations are being processed.
managed.failedDescription: The project and original run were kept without creating or charging for another run.
managed.retrySentDescription: The original research run was dispatched again and is waiting to start.
managed.retryError: Dispatch retry failed. Try again later.
